description_long: This object represents a distorted adult pedestrian figure with elongated limbs and an unnaturally stretched torso. The figure appears to be wearing a knee-length dress adorned with a floral pattern, and the arms and legs are disproportionately long and thin. The head features long, straight hair that falls past the shoulders, and the facial features are not clearly defined due to the distortion. The feet are clad in what resemble shoes, and the hands are splayed with visible fingers. The overall form is highly abstracted, with the body parts appearing twisted and warped, giving the figure a surreal, almost melted appearance. The surface texture is smooth, with a matte finish and visible color transitions between skin, clothing, and footwear.
description: A highly distorted adult pedestrian figure in a floral dress with elongated limbs, long hair, and abstracted features. The form is warped and surreal, with smooth, matte surfaces.
description_view_0: The figure's left side is visible, showing the elongated arm and leg, floral dress, and long hair draping down the back.
description_view_1: A side view highlighting the extreme stretching of the arms and torso, with the head and hair more clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the dress, the long hair, and the warped alignment of the limbs.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizing the extended limbs, the floral dress, and the abstracted posture.
attribute_posture: unnaturally stretched and twisted standing pose
